description: The rescued Sousa is brought aboard Zephyr One. The team tries to keep their true origins secret as Sousa is baffled by the advanced plane. May suddenly experiences a bout of confusion after contact with Sousa, alarming Simmons and Elena. The group piece together that the assassination attempt may not have been the Russians, but Hydra, with Malick possibly involved.
location: Zephyr One (S.H.I.E.L.D. quinjet / mobile command plane)

transcript.line: We were at the mercy of history. We had to keep Sousa safe on the Zephyr until he could make his drop. We didn't tell him where we were from, but he knew something wasn't right.
Miss Carter.
Real name... Jemma Simmons.
Apologies. Welcome aboard?
You've given me names. How about telling me what group you're with? Nobody has aeronautics like this. Not Langley. Definitely not S.H.I.E.L.D.
Our outfit's off the books. You've never heard of it.
Best we keep it that way.
Must be way off the books.
You have no idea.
That's May, doing the flying.
Pretty slick. Never seen a plane on top of a train before. Or a plane on top of a plane, for that matter.
You okay?
W... Who?
May?
Simmons. Sorry. I-I-I-I'm fine.
I think you should come with me. Y-You're not yourself.
I think I know how she feels. You say you have the package? I think it's time you hand it over.
Really? This thing? I think Stark would be more impressed by your flying headquarters.
Our budget's also off the books.
Now that you have this, maybe you can give us something to help us find our missing team member.
Could be he was taken by whoever ordered the hit on the train.
Russians?
Normally, I'd say yes, but I don't think it's the Russians who are after this. I think it's someone else.
Here's your scientist, boss.
Was that in the report you sent the CIA?
There's a bucket of reasons I shouldn't trust you all, but...you did save my life. I think S.H.I.E.L.D. has been infiltrated. By Hydra.
Yep.
Yep.
Wait, what? How do you know that?
Classified, but we're familiar with Hydra.
That's when it hit me. Sousa wasn't killed by the Russians. He was going to expose Hydra's presence within S.H.I.E.L.D., so they took him out.
Who else knew about your meeting with Dr. Lindmore?
Only my superior, also classified.
Name wouldn't happen to be Malick, would it? Sorry to break it to you.
The kid we let live in 1931 had come back to haunt us in 1955.
The name's Wilfred. Now, why don't you tell me who you are because you damn sure don't look like a scientist.
